meanings.definition: free from emotional agitation or nervous tension; ; - Anthony Trollope
examples: the waiters were unflurried and good natured
with contented mind and unruffled spirit

meanings.definition: (of a body of water) free from disturbance by heavy waves
examples: a ribbon of sand between the angry sea and the placid bay
the quiet waters of a lagoon
a lake of tranquil blue water reflecting a tranquil blue sky
scarcely a ripple on the still water
